meta.description: Curated landmark Supreme Court of India judgments (1950-2024). Heavy coverage of 2020-2024 recent precedents.

cases.title: Kesavananda Bharati v. State of Kerala
cases.issue: Can Parliament amend any part of the Constitution?
cases.ruling: Established Basic Structure Doctrine — Parliament cannot alter the basic structure of the Constitution.

cases.title: Maneka Gandhi v. Union of India
cases.issue: Scope of Article 21 — Right to Life and Personal Liberty
cases.ruling: Procedure must be 'just, fair and reasonable' — expanded Art. 21 to include dignity, liberty, due process.

cases.title: Indra Sawhney v. Union of India
cases.issue: Validity of Mandal Commission OBC reservations
cases.ruling: Upheld 27% OBC reservation; capped total reservations at 50%; excluded 'creamy layer'.

cases.title: Vishaka v. State of Rajasthan
cases.issue: Sexual harassment of women at workplace
cases.ruling: Laid Vishaka Guidelines — precursor to Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace Act 2013.

cases.title: Olga Tellis v. Bombay Municipal Corporation
cases.issue: Eviction of pavement dwellers — right to livelihood
cases.ruling: Right to livelihood is integral to right to life under Article 21.

cases.title: Mohd. Ahmed Khan v. Shah Bano Begum
cases.issue: Maintenance to divorced Muslim woman under Section 125 CrPC
cases.ruling: Section 125 applies regardless of religion; ordered maintenance. Triggered Muslim Women (Protection of Rights on Divorce) Act 1986.

cases.title: Navtej Singh Johar v. Union of India
cases.issue: Constitutionality of Section 377 IPC criminalizing same-sex relations
cases.ruling: Section 377 unconstitutional insofar as it criminalises consensual sexual conduct between adults of the same sex.

cases.title: Justice K.S. Puttaswamy v. Union of India
cases.issue: Is Right to Privacy a fundamental right?
cases.ruling: Right to Privacy is a fundamental right under Article 21 and Part III of the Constitution.

cases.title: Shayara Bano v. Union of India
cases.issue: Constitutionality of triple talaq
cases.ruling: Talaq-e-biddat (instant triple talaq) is unconstitutional. Triggered Muslim Women (Protection of Rights on Marriage) Act 2019.

cases.title: Joseph Shine v. Union of India
cases.issue: Constitutionality of Section 497 IPC (adultery)
cases.ruling: Section 497 IPC struck down as unconstitutional — adultery is no longer a criminal offence.

cases.title: Indian Young Lawyers Association v. State of Kerala (Sabarimala)
cases.issue: Entry of women of menstruating age in Sabarimala temple
cases.ruling: Exclusion violates Articles 14, 15, 17 and 25; women of all ages can enter.

cases.title: Aruna Ramchandra Shanbaug v. Union of India
cases.issue: Legality of passive euthanasia
cases.ruling: Passive euthanasia permitted under strict procedure with High Court approval.

cases.title: Common Cause v. Union of India
cases.issue: Right to die with dignity / living wills
cases.ruling: Recognised right to die with dignity; passive euthanasia & advance medical directives (living wills) permitted.

cases.title: National Legal Services Authority v. Union of India
cases.issue: Rights of transgender persons
cases.ruling: Recognised transgender as 'third gender'; right to self-identification of gender.

cases.title: Shreya Singhal v. Union of India
cases.issue: Constitutionality of Section 66A IT Act
cases.ruling: Section 66A struck down as unconstitutional for being vague and violating free speech (Article 19(1)(a)).

cases.title: Mithu v. State of Punjab
cases.issue: Mandatory death sentence under Section 303 IPC
cases.ruling: Section 303 IPC unconstitutional — mandatory death penalty violates Articles 14 and 21.

cases.title: Bachan Singh v. State of Punjab
cases.issue: Constitutionality of death penalty under IPC 302
cases.ruling: Death penalty constitutional but only in 'rarest of rare' cases.

cases.title: Selvi v. State of Karnataka
cases.issue: Constitutionality of narco-analysis, polygraph & BEAP tests
cases.ruling: Involuntary administration violates Articles 20(3) and 21; only with informed consent.

cases.title: D.K. Basu v. State of West Bengal
cases.issue: Custodial torture and arrest procedure
cases.ruling: Laid 11 mandatory arrest guidelines — codified in CrPC Section 41B and BNSS.

cases.title: Lalita Kumari v. Government of Uttar Pradesh
cases.issue: Is FIR registration mandatory on cognizable offence info?
cases.ruling: Yes — FIR registration is mandatory under Section 154 CrPC; preliminary inquiry only in specific categories (matrimonial, commercial, medical).

cases.title: Arnesh Kumar v. State of Bihar
cases.issue: Mechanical arrests in dowry / 498A cases
cases.ruling: No arrest under Section 498A IPC and offences punishable up to 7 years without Section 41 CrPC checklist; notice under 41A instead.

cases.title: Sushil Kumar Sharma v. Union of India (Tandoor case predecessor)
cases.issue: Misuse of Section 498A IPC
cases.ruling: 498A is a shield not a weapon; courts must guard against false implication while protecting genuine victims.

cases.title: Vishal Jeet v. Union of India
cases.issue: Rescue and rehabilitation of child prostitutes and devadasis
cases.ruling: Directed States to set up advisory committees; rehabilitation duty under Articles 23 & 24.

cases.title: Sushil Ansal v. State (Uphaar Cinema fire)
cases.issue: Liability of building owners for fire safety negligence
cases.ruling: Convicted under 304A IPC; established precedent for corporate manslaughter liability.

cases.title: Bandhua Mukti Morcha v. Union of India
cases.issue: Bonded labour in stone quarries
cases.ruling: Bonded labour violates Articles 21 and 23; State must identify, release and rehabilitate.

cases.title: M.C. Mehta v. Union of India (Oleum Gas Leak)
cases.issue: Industrial liability for hazardous activity
cases.ruling: Absolute liability principle — hazardous industry liable regardless of negligence.

cases.title: Indian Council for Enviro-Legal Action v. Union of India
cases.issue: Polluter pays principle
cases.ruling: Polluter pays principle is part of Indian environmental jurisprudence.

cases.title: Subhash Kumar v. State of Bihar
cases.issue: Right to clean environment under Article 21
cases.ruling: Right to live includes right to enjoyment of pollution-free water and air.

cases.title: Swiss Ribbons v. Union of India
cases.issue: Constitutionality of IBC (Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code)
cases.ruling: Upheld IBC; affirmed creditor-debtor framework and distinction between financial and operational creditors.

cases.title: Rajeev Suri v. Delhi Development Authority (Central Vista)
cases.issue: Challenge to Central Vista redevelopment project
cases.ruling: Upheld the project; reaffirmed deference to executive on policy matters subject to constitutional limits.

cases.title: Anuradha Bhasin v. Union of India (Kashmir Internet)
cases.issue: Internet shutdowns in J&K post Article 370 abrogation
cases.ruling: Freedom of speech under 19(1)(a) and trade under 19(1)(g) extend to the Internet; orders restricting access must be proportionate and reviewable.

cases.title: Arnab Goswami v. State of Maharashtra
cases.issue: Personal liberty and arrest of journalists
cases.ruling: High Courts must safeguard personal liberty under Article 226; bail is the rule, jail the exception.

cases.title: Satender Kumar Antil v. CBI
cases.issue: Bail jurisprudence and Section 41A CrPC compliance
cases.ruling: Reiterated Arnesh Kumar; classified offences into categories with specific bail guidelines.

cases.title: Shakti Vahini v. Union of India (Honour Killing)
cases.issue: Honour killings and khap panchayat violence
cases.ruling: Directed preventive, remedial and punitive measures to deal with khap-style assemblies and inter-caste/inter-faith couple violence.

cases.title: Faheema Shirin R.K. v. State of Kerala
cases.issue: Right to Internet access for students
cases.ruling: Right to access the Internet is part of right to education and right to privacy.

cases.title: Shafin Jahan v. Asokan K.M. (Hadiya case)
cases.issue: Right of an adult woman to marry person of choice
cases.ruling: Right to choose life partner is a fundamental right under Articles 19 and 21; courts cannot annul adult choice.

cases.title: Mohan Lal v. State of Punjab
cases.issue: Bias when investigating officer is also the complainant in NDPS
cases.ruling: Where complainant is the investigating officer, trial is vitiated due to fundamental bias.

cases.title: X v. Principal Secretary (Abortion case)
cases.issue: MTP rights for unmarried women up to 24 weeks
cases.ruling: MTP Act applies to all women regardless of marital status; recognised marital rape for MTP purposes.

cases.title: Anita Kushwaha v. Pushap Sudan
cases.issue: Right to access to justice
cases.ruling: Access to justice is a fundamental right under Articles 14 and 21.

cases.title: Union of India v. Association for Democratic Reforms
cases.issue: Right of voters to know candidates' criminal records
cases.ruling: Right to information about candidates flows from Article 19(1)(a); affidavits mandatory.

cases.title: Vivek Narayan Sharma v. Union of India (Demonetisation case)
cases.issue: Constitutionality of 2016 demonetisation of ₹500 and ₹1000 notes
cases.ruling: 4:1 majority upheld the 8 November 2016 demonetisation as valid; dissent by Justice Nagarathna found procedure under Section 26(2) RBI Act was not properly followed.

cases.title: Supriyo a.k.a. Supriya Chakraborty v. Union of India (Marriage Equality)
cases.issue: Right of same-sex couples to marry under SMA / personal laws
cases.ruling: Court declined to grant legal recognition to same-sex marriage; left it to Parliament. Recognised right to choose partner; directed government committee on adoption/welfare benefits.

cases.title: Subhash Desai v. Principal Secretary, Governor of Maharashtra
cases.issue: Maharashtra political crisis 2022 / Shiv Sena split / anti-defection
cases.ruling: Speaker's discretion on disqualification petitions cannot be open-ended; Governor's invitation to alternate CM was unjustified. Reaffirmed Nabam Rebia limits on Speaker.

cases.title: Anoop Baranwal v. Union of India (CEC Appointment)
cases.issue: Process of appointment of Chief Election Commissioner and ECs
cases.ruling: CEC and ECs to be appointed by a committee of PM, LoP and CJI to ensure independence. (Subsequently overridden by 2023 Act).

cases.title: Joint Commr of Income Tax v. Reliance Industries
cases.issue: Section 271(1)(c) penalty for income concealment
cases.ruling: Mere making a wrong claim does not amount to furnishing inaccurate particulars; penalty not automatic.

cases.title: In Re: Article 370 of the Constitution
cases.issue: Constitutionality of abrogation of Article 370 (J&K special status, 5 Aug 2019)
cases.ruling: Upheld abrogation as constitutional. Directed elections to J&K Legislative Assembly by 30 Sept 2024 and restoration of statehood at the earliest. Set up truth-and-reconciliation committee on human rights violations.

cases.title: Association for Democratic Reforms v. Union of India (Electoral Bonds)
cases.issue: Constitutionality of the Electoral Bond Scheme 2018
cases.ruling: Electoral Bond Scheme struck down as unconstitutional; violates Art 19(1)(a) right of voter to know political donors. SBI ordered to disclose all bond data.

cases.title: Aishat Shifa v. State of Karnataka (Hijab case)
cases.issue: Ban on wearing hijab in pre-university colleges
cases.ruling: Split verdict — referred to larger bench. Issue of essential religious practice + right to dress under Art 25 unresolved.

cases.title: Noel Harper v. Union of India (FCRA)
cases.issue: Validity of 2020 FCRA amendments restricting foreign contributions to NGOs
cases.ruling: Upheld FCRA amendments — sovereignty over foreign funding is constitutional; NGOs must comply with stricter routing through SBI New Delhi.

cases.title: CPIL v. Union of India (Rakesh Asthana case)
cases.issue: Appointment of Delhi Police Commissioner without 2-year residual tenure
cases.ruling: Upheld appointment but reaffirmed Prakash Singh police reforms — minimum 2 years tenure as norm; exceptions must be reasoned.

cases.title: Manohar Lal Sharma v. Union of India (Pegasus)
cases.issue: Surveillance via Pegasus spyware on Indian citizens
cases.ruling: Set up expert committee headed by Justice R.V. Raveendran. Affirmed right to privacy under Art 21 extends to digital surveillance; national security cannot be a blanket defence.

cases.title: Sri Marthanda Varma v. State of Kerala (Padmanabhaswamy Temple)
cases.issue: Administration of Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple wealth
cases.ruling: Royal family of Travancore has shebaitship rights; administration committee + audit framework reinforced.

cases.title: Kaushal Kishor v. State of UP (Free speech of Ministers)
cases.issue: Can additional restrictions be placed on free speech of constitutional functionaries?
cases.ruling: Restrictions in Art 19(2) are exhaustive; State cannot impose more on Ministers' speech, but principle of collective responsibility applies.

cases.title: Mohd. Abdul Samad v. State of Telangana
cases.issue: Maintenance under Sec 125 CrPC vs Muslim Women Act 1986
cases.ruling: Section 125 CrPC applies to Muslim women even if maintained under MW Act 1986. Reaffirms Daniel Latifi.

cases.title: Vijay Madanlal Choudhary v. Union of India (PMLA)
cases.issue: Constitutionality of PMLA — ED powers, twin bail conditions, ECIR not given to accused
cases.ruling: Upheld bulk of PMLA. Accused not entitled to ECIR; Section 45 twin bail conditions valid. Currently under review in 2023-24.

cases.title: Bilkis Yakub Rasool v. Union of India (Bilkis Bano case)
cases.issue: Remission granted to 11 convicts in 2002 Gujarat riot gang rape case
cases.ruling: Quashed Gujarat Government's remission order; remitted convicts must surrender. Gujarat was not 'appropriate Government' as trial was in Maharashtra.

cases.title: Mahua Moitra v. Lok Sabha Speaker
cases.issue: Expulsion of MP for cash-for-query allegations
cases.ruling: Pending. Raises questions on Ethics Committee process, natural justice, and judicial review of expulsion.

cases.title: X v. Union of India (24-week pregnancy termination)
cases.issue: Whether 14-year-old rape survivor can terminate pregnancy beyond 24 weeks
cases.ruling: Permitted termination considering best interests of minor and Articles 14 and 21; appointed medical board.

cases.title: In Re: Anil Kapoor v. Simply Life India (Personality rights)
cases.issue: Misuse of celebrity name, image, voice using AI/deepfakes
cases.ruling: Granted John Doe injunction protecting personality rights including voice, signature, and likeness from AI misuse.

cases.title: Pankaj Bansal v. Union of India (PMLA arrest grounds)
cases.issue: Whether ED must furnish written grounds of arrest to accused
cases.ruling: Mandatory to provide grounds of arrest in writing; oral communication insufficient. Failure renders arrest illegal.

cases.title: Manish Sisodia v. Directorate of Enforcement
cases.issue: Bail in PMLA / Delhi excise policy case
cases.ruling: Granted bail; reaffirmed 'bail is the rule, jail is the exception'; right to speedy trial under Art 21 is sacrosanct even in PMLA cases.

cases.title: Arvind Kejriwal v. Directorate of Enforcement
cases.issue: Validity of arrest of sitting Chief Minister by ED in PMLA case
cases.ruling: Granted interim bail. Laid down test for 'necessity of arrest' under PMLA Section 19; ED's discretion is judicially reviewable.

cases.title: Aligarh Muslim University v. Naresh Agarwal
cases.issue: Minority status of AMU under Article 30
cases.ruling: 4:3 majority overruled Azeez Basha (1967); held AMU CAN be a minority institution. Remitted question of fact to regular bench applying new criteria.

cases.title: State of Punjab v. Davinder Singh (SC sub-classification)
cases.issue: Can States sub-classify Scheduled Castes for reservation?
cases.ruling: 6:1 majority allowed sub-classification within SCs to give preferential treatment to more backward groups. Recognised creamy layer principle in SC/ST.

cases.title: Property Owners Association v. State of Maharashtra
cases.issue: Whether all private property is 'material resource of community' under Art 39(b)
cases.ruling: 8:1 majority held NOT all private property qualifies; case-by-case test of public good required. Overruled Ranganatha Reddy minority view (which Sanjeev Coke had endorsed).

cases.title: Just Rights for Children Alliance v. S. Harish
cases.issue: Whether watching or storing CSAM is offence under POCSO/IT Act
cases.ruling: Even mere storage and viewing is an offence under POCSO Sec 15 + IT Act Sec 67B; constructive possession test laid down. Overruled Madras HC ruling.

cases.title: In Re: Direction in the matter of demolition of structures
cases.issue: Demolition of properties of accused without due process ('bulldozer justice')
cases.ruling: Demolition before conviction is unconstitutional; mandated 15-day notice, hearing opportunity, written reasoned order, and video recording of demolition. Officials personally liable for violations.

cases.title: All India Democratic Women's Association v. Union of India (Marital Rape)
cases.issue: Constitutionality of Exception 2 to Sec 63 BNS / 375 IPC (marital rape exemption)
cases.ruling: Sub-judice. Earlier 2022 Delhi HC split verdict.

cases.title: Umar Khalid v. State (NCT of Delhi)
cases.issue: Bail in UAPA case for 2020 Delhi riots
cases.ruling: Multiple bail rejections; raises Article 21 questions on under-trial detention; sub-judice.

cases.title: Ashwini Upadhyay v. Union of India (Places of Worship Act)
cases.issue: Challenge to Sec 3 of Places of Worship Act 1991
cases.ruling: Sub-judice; interim stay on lower court orders directing surveys of religious places.

cases.title: Tarsem Lal v. Directorate of Enforcement
cases.issue: Twin bail conditions under Sec 45 PMLA where Magistrate has taken cognizance
cases.ruling: Twin conditions don't apply when accused appears voluntarily on summons; further arrest by ED needs court permission.
